title: Senior Django Developer for FinTech Trading API Platform
description: We're a US-based fintech building a trading & market-data platform and need an experienced Django engineer to own our REST API. You'll design and ship endpoints for order management, positions and account data, wire up token auth + rate limiting, and offload heavy work to Celery. Experience integrating brokerage or market-data feeds (Interactive Brokers, Alpaca, MetaTrader) is a big plus. Clean, tested code and clear async communication required. Long-term, 30+ hrs/week.
screening_questions: How many years of experience do you have with Django REST Framework?
Have you integrated third-party trading or market-data APIs before?
What is your weekly availability and timezone overlap?

title: MetaTrader 5 Expert Advisor — Custom Trading Bot (MQL5)
description: Looking for an MQL5 developer to build a custom MetaTrader 5 Expert Advisor from an existing strategy spec (trend + mean-reversion, multi-symbol). Must handle position sizing, trailing stops, a news filter and a settings panel. Deliverables: compiled EA, source, and a short Loom walkthrough. Backtesting on provided tick data required.
screening_questions: Can you share MT5/MQL5 code samples?
Will you backtest on our provided tick data?

title: WebRTC Video Chat Integration for Telehealth App
description: Our telehealth web app needs reliable 1:1 video visits. Integrate WebRTC (open to mediasoup or another SFU) into our React frontend and Node backend, with a signaling server, TURN fallback, screen-share and basic call-quality stats. HIPAA-aware handling is a plus.
screening_questions: Have you shipped WebRTC to production?
Are you familiar with HIPAA requirements?

title: Fix bugs on existing WordPress site (menu, form, speed)
description: Need someone to fix a few bugs on my WordPress site — the menu isn't responsive, the contact form isn't sending, and pages load slowly. Should be quick for the right person. Low budget, ongoing work possible if things go well.
